caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a wooden lectern in a room featuring a textured, dark green stone wall. He is dressed in a light-colored kurta paired with a matching sleeveless Nehru jacket. Two microphones are positioned on the lectern in front of him. To his side stands a tall, slender gold-colored vase containing red flowers. Across the sequence, Modi is captured speaking, shifting his posture and gesturing with his hands. In the initial frames, he remains relatively still with his hands clasped or resting near the lectern. As the sequence progresses, he looks slightly upward and to his left, eventually raising his right hand with his index finger extended to emphasize a point. The background and lighting remain consistent throughout the clip, focusing entirely on his delivery from the podium.
